content:
Kate came off the mood stabilizers and damn was it a tough day for her. I missed her so much. Even through all the tears. It felt like I had my wife back. Felt love so strong I hadn't felt in weeks. That said idk if it's actually for the best. Things are easier with the pills. Ugh. So hard. 

Also Ava was such a shit. She has so many problems and everyone is doing their best to help but she is not willing to put in any effort of her own. What's that saying, you can lead a horse to water but you can't make it stop drowning itself for no fucking reason. I'm angry and my feelings are valid. I try my best to speak nice and stick up for her but God damn she makes it hard.
